name: sermonindex-app
description: SermonIndex Node Software — Decentralized P2P Sermon Library

scripts.lint: if command -v eslint >/dev/null 2>&1; then eslint src; else echo 'ESLint not installed. Enable with: npm i -D eslint  (flat config already at eslint.config.mjs). Skipping lint.'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then vitest run; else echo 'Vitest not installed. Enable with: npm i -D vitest  and add *.test.js files. Skipping tests.'; fi
scripts.audit:rust: echo 'Run in src-tauri/: cargo update && cargo audit  (install once: cargo install cargo-audit). See SECURITY.md.'

author: SermonIndex
